title: tephrosia clementis
intro: Tephrosia clementis, also known as the Clement's Horsefly Tree or Clement's Tephrosia, is a plant species in the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia clementis are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Tephrosia clementis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies for its potential therapeutic applications.
